title: Jaden
html:
Stub. The person Sam Solum kissed and shared a bed with ~4 weeks before Yahir found out — the discovery that ended the Sam arc in the May 7 doc. Identity beyond first-name unknown. Promoted from Potential Entities (queued slice 5) on second contextual appearance.

Connections: sam · 2024 05 07 things ending with sam · 2024 05 07 thoughts and things 5724 morning after sam

related.label: Morning after Sam — embrace the wave, you-vs-you world, deploy yourself next time
